Name: PLAYER_LIGHT_PARAM
Description: Defines dynamic light settings attached to the player, including color, intensity, shadow behavior, flickering, and environmental interaction.

Fields.Name: Position: X Offset
Fields.Description: Light position offset along the X axis relative to the player.

Fields.Name: Position: Y Offset
Fields.Description: Light position offset along the Y axis relative to the player.

Fields.Name: Position: Z Offset
Fields.Description: Light position offset along the Z axis relative to the player.

Fields.Name: Diffuse: Red
Fields.Description: Red component of the diffuse light color.

Fields.Name: Diffuse: Green
Fields.Description: Green component of the diffuse light color.

Fields.Name: Diffuse: Blue
Fields.Description: Blue component of the diffuse light color.

Fields.Name: Specular: Red
Fields.Description: Red component of the specular highlight color.

Fields.Name: Specular: Green
Fields.Description: Green component of the specular highlight color.

Fields.Name: Specular: Blue
Fields.Description: Blue component of the specular highlight color.

Fields.Name: Diffuse: Alpha
Fields.Description: Alpha (intensity) component of the diffuse light.

Fields.Name: Specular: Alpha
Fields.Description: Alpha (intensity) component of the specular light.

Fields.Name: Light Radius
Fields.Description: Radius of influence for the light source.

Fields.Name: Priority
Fields.Description: Determines rendering or evaluation priority when multiple lights overlap.

Fields.Name: Shadow Depth
Fields.Description: Intensity of shadows cast by this light.

Fields.Name: Blink Duration Max
Fields.Description: Maximum duration of light flickering.

Fields.Name: Blink Duration Min
Fields.Description: Minimum duration of light flickering.

Fields.Name: Blink Intensity
Fields.Description: Strength of light flickering effect.

Fields.Name: Wind-Affected Shadow Depth
Fields.Description: Shadow depth when influenced by wind effects.

Fields.Name: Wind-Affected Blink Duration Max
Fields.Description: Maximum flicker duration under wind influence.

Fields.Name: Wind-Affected Blink Duration Min
Fields.Description: Minimum flicker duration under wind influence.

Fields.Name: Wind-Affected Blink Intensity
Fields.Description: Flicker intensity when affected by wind.

Fields.Name: Enable Shadow Casting
Fields.Description: Determines whether this light casts shadows.

Fields.Name: Enable Wind Influence
Fields.Description: Determines whether the light is affected by wind-based effects.
